goal: Create cli.py with an argparse-based CLI for the bookmark manager. Subcommands: 'add --url URL --title TITLE [--tags tag1,tag2]' (prints added bookmark id), 'list' (prints all bookmarks as a formatted table), 'search QUERY' (searches url/title), 'tag TAG' (searches by tag), 'delete ID' (deletes by id). Use BookmarkStore from models.py. Make the script executable with if __name__ == '__main__'. The default store file should be 'bookmarks.json'.
verify: python3 -c 'import os; os.remove("test_cli.json") if os.path.exists("test_cli.json") else None' && python3 cli.py add --url https://example.com --title TestSite --tags dev,test && python3 cli.py list && python3 cli.py search example && python3 cli.py tag dev
